case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA VS. CHENOA M ESTRADA et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-01-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-01-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
